title: Office Blues — Misery Data: U.S. occupation wages + city burnout index
description: Open data on the cost of work, maintained by Office Blues. Two aggregate datasets derived from public sources: U.S. occupation annual wage percentiles (from BLS OEWS) and a composite city burnout index for the 50 largest U.S. metro areas. Aggregates only — no personal or per-visitor data. Methodology and the underlying tools live at officeblues.net.
notes: ORCID/ROR creator identifiers to be added in a future release (see Office Blues growth backlog).
